micro_rules: Never invent service names outside the provided service_list_snippet.

rows.command_eng: Set the living room light to yellow.
Capture an image of the meeting room with the camera.
rows.output: {"name":"Capture an image of the meeting room with the camera","cron":"","period":0,"code":"(#MeetingRoom_Camera).camera_captureimage()"}

rows.command_eng: Set all dehumidifiers in the lab to AI drying mode.
rows.output: {"name":"Set all dehumidifiers in the lab to AI drying mode","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#Lab_Dehumidifier_1).dehumidifier_dehumidifiermode == \"dehumidifying\" and (#Lab_Dehumidifier_2).dehumidifier_dehumidifiermode == \"dehumidifying\") { (#Lab_Dehumidifier_1).dehumidifier_setdehumidifiermode(\"AIDrying\"); (#Lab_Dehumidifier_2).dehumidifier_setdehumidifiermode(\"AIDrying\"); }"}

rows.command_eng: Set the hue of the living room light to 240 and the saturation to 80.
rows.output: {"name":"Set the hue of the living room light to 240 and the saturation to 80.","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#LivingRoom #Light).light_currenthue == 240 and (#LivingRoom #Light).light_currentsaturation == 80) { (#LivingRoom #Light).light_movetohueandsaturation(240, 80) }"}
